notes: T6 roadblock loop from post-T5 baseline. Each attempt benchmarked via `script/perf-bench.ts`; lower is better for responsiveness metrics.

baselineSnapshot.source: post-T5 working tree (no T6 attempt applied)

attempts.candidate: Reduce regex overhead in char classification
attempts.reason: Hotspot regressed (`w`/`b` slower than baseline) and `h` exceeded non-word regression budget.

attempts.candidate: Reduce repeated line/cursor fetches in hot paths
attempts.reason: Only marginal gain; weaker safety trade-off (less guard verification) not justified.

attempts.change: Add guarded direct state cursor update (`tryMoveCursorByState`) with canonical fallback in `moveCursorBy`.
attempts.reason: Orders-of-magnitude hotspot win with non-word path impact below 10% threshold.

attempts.candidate: Rework boundary-table search strategy (array index vs binary search)
attempts.change: Binary-search token-table lookup in `word-boundary-cache.ts` (attempted on top of attempt 3).
attempts.reason: `dw` regression and higher memory made trade-off worse than selected attempt 3 baseline.

attempts.change: Added line-specific invalidation hooks and broader mutation-time cache clearing (attempted on top of attempt 3).
attempts.reason: `dw` degraded and startup incremental median breached +10 ms acceptance threshold.

keptChanges: index.ts: guarded direct line-local cursor updates in `moveCursorBy`
